recalls.Description: Kubota Tractor Corporation has issued a recall for its RTV-series Utility Vehicles due to a significant crash hazard. The affected models include RTV520, RTV-X1120, RTV-X1130, RTV-X1140, RTV-X900, and RTV-X1100C. Consumers can locate the model numbers on the side of the vehicle and the serial numbers on the left side, behind the driver, on a plate facing backward where the bed meets the cab. The vehicles were available in various colors such as orange, black, and camo.
recalls.Title: Kubota Recalls RTV-Series Utility Vehicles Due to Potential Crash Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact Kubota Tractor Corporation at 888-458-2682, available from 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. Additional information can be found online at https://www.kubotausa.com/recall/service-support/safety/safety-notices or by visiting www.kubotausa.com and selecting 'Safety & Recall' at the bottom of the page. A contact form is also available at https://www.kubotausa.com/recall/contact/form.

Injuries.Name: The firm has received four reports of loosened or separated ball joints. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Authorized Kubota dealers across the nation, available from January 2021 through December 2024, priced between $11,000 and $27,000.

Distributors.Name: Kubota Tractor Corporation, of Grapevine, Texas

Hazards.Name: Risk of crash due to potential separation of front suspension arm ball joint

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled utility vehicles and contact an authorized Kubota dealer for a free inspection and repair. Kubota will reach out to registered owners directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Kubota recalls RTV-series Utility Vehicles due to crash hazards. Contact Kubota for inspection and repair details.

recalls.Description: Honda has issued a recall for accessory heaters designed for the 2023-2025 Pioneer 700, 2022-2024 Pioneer 1000, and 2022-2024 Talon 1000 side-by-side vehicles. These heaters were sold separately and feature a control panel mounted on the vehicle's dashboard, allowing users to adjust air speed, airflow direction, and temperature. To determine if your vehicle is affected, you can enter the VIN at https://powersports.honda.com/recalls. The VIN can be found in the owner's manual under the Technical Information - Vehicle Identification section.
recalls.Title: Honda Recalls Accessory Heaters for Pioneer and Talon Vehicles Due to Fire Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, contact American Honda at 866-784-1870 from 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or visit https://powersports.honda.com and click on 'Recall Information' for more details.

Products.Name: Accessory Heaters for Honda Pioneer 700, Pioneer 1000, and Talon 1000 Vehicles

Images.Caption: Recalled accessory heater system and control panel
Compatible Honda Pioneer and Honda Talon vehicles

Injuries.Name: Honda has received three reports of the recalled accessory heaters overheating, including two incidents resulting in fires and vehicle damage. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Authorized Honda Powersports dealers across the nation from January 2022 to September 2024, priced between $900 and $1,040

Distributors.Name: American Honda Motor Co. Inc, of Torrance, California

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazards due to overheating

Remedies.Name: Immediate cessation of use and free repair through authorized Honda Powersports dealers

recalls.metaDescription: Honda recalls accessory heaters for Pioneer and Talon vehicles due to fire hazards. Find out if your vehicle is affected and how to get a free repair.

recalls.Description: Kawasaki USA has announced a recall for its 2024 Mule PRO-FX™ 1000, PRO-FXR™ 1000, and PRO-FXT™ 1000 off-highway utility vehicles due to a potential fire hazard. These vehicles, available in various colors including Metallic Sierra Blue and Firecracker Red, may experience improper combustion when starting, leading to a fire risk. The Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) can be found on the forward frame rail beneath the seat, and additional model information is available in the owner's manual.
recalls.Title: Kawasaki USA Issues Recall for Mule PRO 1000 Utility Vehicles Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Kawasaki toll-free at 866-802-9381 from 7 a.m. to 4 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or visit www.kawasaki.com/en-us/owner-center/recalls for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled MULE PRO-FXT 1000 LE in Metallic Sierra Blue
Recalled MULE PRO-FXT 1000 LE in Metallic Onyx Black
Recalled MULE PRO-FX 1000 HD Edition in Firecracker Red
Recalled MULE PRO-FXR 1000 in Metallic Sierra Blue
Recalled MULE PRO-FXR 1000 LE in Ice Gray
Recalled MULE PRO-FXT 1000 LE Camo in TRUETIMBER Strata
Recalled MULE PRO-FXT 1000 LE Ranch Edition in Metallic Titanium
Recalled MULE PRO-FXT 1000 Platinum Ranch Edition in Metallic Stardust White

Injuries.Name: Kawasaki has received three reports of fires occurring during engine start up. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Kawasaki Motors Manufacturing Corp., U.S.A., of Lincoln, Neb.

Retailers.Name: Available at Kawasaki dealers across the nation from June 2023 to April 2024, priced between $15,100 and $21,900.

Distributors.Name: Kawasaki Motors Corp. U.S.A., of Foothill Ranch, Calif.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to improper combustion when starting the engine.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease use of the recalled vehicles and contact a Kawasaki dealer for a complimentary repair, which includes ECU reprogramming and sub-harness installation.

recalls.metaDescription: Kawasaki recalls Mule PRO 1000 utility vehicles due to fire hazards. Contact Kawasaki for repairs and details.

recalls.Description: Textron Specialized Vehicles has announced a recall for specific models of Prowler Pro and Tracker utility vehicles from the 2022 and 2023 model years. These vehicles, available in various colors such as green, gray, red, fossil, and timber, feature the names 'Prowler' or 'Tracker' on the side of the cargo box. The vehicle identification number (VIN) can be found on the operator side of the frame beneath the cargo box, with the 10th digit indicating the model year: 'N' for 2022 and 'P' for 2023.
recalls.Title: Textron Specialized Vehicles Issues Recall for Prowler Pro and Tracker Utility Vehicles Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Textron Specialized Vehicles at 800-279-2281, available from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. You can also reach them via email at arcticcatwarranty@textron.com or visit their websites at https://arcticcat.txtsv.com/owners/recalls, https://www.trackeroffroad.com/recalls.html, https://arcticcat.txtsv.com, or https://www.trackeroffroad.com and click on 'Recalls' at the bottom.

Products.Name: Prowler Pro Utility Vehicle
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 10,300 (In addition, about 1,000 were sold in Canada)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 48 reports of incidents of fuel leakage around the cap. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Textron Specialized Vehicles, of Augusta, Georgia

Retailers.Name: Available through Arctic Cat and Tracker dealers nationwide, including Bass Pro Shops, Cabela's, and various independent dealerships from April 2021 to September 2023, priced between $14,000 and $22,000.

Hazards.Name: Improperly fitting fuel tank cap leading to fuel leaks and fire hazards

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled vehicles and contact an authorized dealer for a free inspection and repair. Textron Specialized Vehicles will reach out to all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Textron recalls Prowler Pro and Tracker UTVs due to fire hazards. Contact Textron for inspection and repair details.

recalls.Description: Intimidator and Mahindra have issued a recall for several utility vehicle (UTV) models due to a potential crash hazard. The affected models include the Intimidator GC1K Classic, GC1K Crew, GC1K Truck, and various versions of the Intimidator 750, 800, and 1000 Diesel, as well as Mahindra Retriever models. These vehicles were sold in multiple colors and feature the brand name on the front grill with the model series indicated on the rear-side panels. Serial numbers for the recalled UTVs range from 000000 to 014034 for Intimidator models and 000000 to 010545 for Mahindra models. Consumers are urged to check their vehicles against these serial numbers for safety.
recalls.Title: Intimidator and Mahindra Utility Vehicles Recalled Due to Crash Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Intimidator at 888-215-8121 from 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email recall@intimidatorutv.com. More details are available at http://www.intimidatorutv.com under 'RECALL INFORMATION'. For Mahindra UTVs, visit www.mahindrausa.com/--recall-notices or click on 'Recall Notices' at the bottom of the homepage. Intimidator will also reach out to all registered owners via mail.

Images.Caption: Recalled Intimidator & Mahindra GC1K Crew UTV

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 40 reports of incidents, including 12 involving a brake line impact. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Intimidator and Mahindra authorized dealers across the U.S. from August 2013 to November 2023, priced between $11,000 and $21,500

Hazards.Name: Risk of crash due to potential brake line failure

Remedies.Name: Stop using the vehicles and contact an authorized dealer for a free repair

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: Intimidator and Mahindra UTVs recalled due to crash hazards. Check your model and contact for repairs.

recalls.Description: Kubota is recalling its RTV-XG850 utility vehicles, commonly referred to as the "Sidekick." These vehicles are identifiable by the model name and number displayed on their sides and were available in multiple colors. The affected models have serial numbers ranging from 31706-35058, Y1025-Y1310, 50011-50012, and 50075-52920, as indicated on their data plates.
recalls.Title: Kubota Recalls RTV-XG850 Sidekick Utility Vehicles Due to Potential Crash Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Kubota Tractor Corporation at 888-458-2682 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or visit https://www.kubotausa.com/recall/contact/form. More details can be found at www.kubotausa.com under Parts & Service, then by selecting the "Safety & Recall Notices" tab, or directly at https://www.kubotausa.com/recall/service-support/safety/safety-notices.

Products.Name: RTV-XG850 Sidekick
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 3,170 (In addition, about 119 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Kubota Utility Vehicle Model RTV-XG850, Sidekick
Recalled Kubota Utility Vehicle Model RTV-XG850, Sidekick

Retailers.Name: Available through authorized Kubota dealers across the country from March 2023 to September 2023, priced between $14,500 and $18,200.

Distributors.Name: Kubota Tractor Corporation, of Grapevine, Texas

Hazards.Name: Improper assembly of steering shaft components may cause loss of control, leading to crash risks.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease use of the recalled utility vehicles and reach out to an authorized Kubota dealer for a complimentary inspection and repair. Kubota is proactively contacting all known buyers.

recalls.metaDescription: Kubota recalls RTV-XG850 Sidekick Utility Vehicles due to crash hazards. Contact Kubota for free inspections and repairs.

recalls.Description: Segway Powersports is recalling the 2022 Fugleman Utility-Terrain Vehicles (UTVs) identified by model numbers UT10E and UT10X. These vehicles, available in colors such as white, black, gray, and camo, feature "FUGLEMAN" decals on both rear side panels and the Segway logo on the hood. The model number is also displayed on the rear side panels next to the Fugleman logo.
recalls.Title: Segway Powersports Recalls 2022 Fugleman UT10E and UT10X UTVs Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Segway Powersports at 877-628-0202 between 8 a.m. and 5 p.m. CT, Monday to Friday. Additional information can be found online at https://www.segwaypowersports.us/recalls/ or by visiting https://segwaypowersports.us and selecting "Safety Recalls" at the bottom of the homepage.

Products.Name: 2022 Fugleman UT10E Utility-Terrain Vehicle
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 1,100 (In addition, about 480 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Segway Powersports 2022 Fugleman UT10E Utility-Terrain Vehicles
Recalled Segway Powersports 2022 Fugleman UT10X Utility-Terrain Vehicle

Injuries.Name: The firm has received one report of a vehicle fire with property damage. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Segway Technology Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Authorized Segway Powersports dealers (off-road vehicle sellers) from December 2021 to July 2023, priced between $14,400 and $16,700

Importers.Name: Segway Powersports Inc., of McKinney, Texas

Hazards.Name: Risk of fire due to ignition coil failure

Remedies.Name: Free repair with an upgrade kit at authorized Segway Powersports dealers

recalls.metaDescription: Segway Powersports recalls 2022 Fugleman UT10E and UT10X UTVs due to a fire hazard. Immediate action recommended for consumers.
